SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffHeader

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffHeader
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable, Writable
public class CoffHeader extends Object implements Writable
COFF file header containing machine type, timestamp, and characteristics. The header appears at the start of a COFF object file.

  • Constructor Summary

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a COFF header from a builder.

    Constructs a COFF header by parsing from a parser.

  • Constructor Details

    • CoffHeader

      protected CoffHeader(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Builder builder)
      Constructs a COFF header from a builder.
      Parameters:
      coff - the parent COFF file
      builder - the builder containing header configuration

    • CoffHeader

      protected CoffHeader(CoffFile coff, CoffFile.Parser parser) throws IOException
      Constructs a COFF header by parsing from a parser.
      Parameters:
      coff - the parent COFF file
      parser - the parser containing the input stream
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during parsing
